plan.title: feat(ts-migration): port verify:story-ready (story-start Gate 0) to TS (Wave 2)

narratives.Description: Port scripts/preflight_story_start.py into @deftai/core, preserving the three-state exit and the clean-tree, active-vBRIEF, and allocation-context consent-token checks. The TypeScript port reproduces the swarm-cohort versus solo classification and golden-diffs its findings and exit codes against the Python oracle with cache off.
narratives.Overview:
## Parent

#1530 (Part 1 of 2; umbrella epic #1545)

## What to build

Port the story-start Gate 0 (`scripts/preflight_story_start.py`) to TS, preserving the three-state exit and the clean-tree / active-vBRIEF / allocation-context consent-token checks.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `verify:story-ready` runs on TS with three-state exit preserved
- [ ] Golden-output parity vs the Python oracle (cache-off)
- [ ] Clean-tree, active-vBRIEF, and `## Allocation context` token checks reproduced
- [ ] `task check` passes

## Standing invariants (all Part-1 children)
- The Python suite is the **parity oracle** and runs **wholesale** (not affected-sliced) until deleted.
- `task check` stays green at every step (strangler-fig; no big-bang).
- The parity gate runs **cache-off** so a golden diff is never served from cache.
- No Python module is deleted until its TS replacement covers historical bug fixtures (not just happy-path) and CI usage.
- No agent-runtime dependency (that is Part 2, #1707); no monorepo orchestrator on day one (Nx never; Turborepo only on a measured trigger).

## Type

AFK

## Blocked by

- Blocked by #1718
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
- Port the git clean-tree probe, the active+running lifecycle check, and the Allocation context parser from scripts/preflight_story_start.py into packages/core/src/story-ready/ modules.
- Add packages/cli/src/verify-story-ready.ts plus a parity harness and vitest fixtures that verify the three-state exit against the Python oracle with cache off.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft orchestrator, I want the story-start Gate 0 ported to TypeScript, so that story readiness is verified without depending on the Python runtime.

items.title: verify:story-ready returns exit 0 for a clean tree with an a

narrative.Acceptance: verify:story-ready returns exit 0 for a clean tree with an active running vBRIEF and a satisfied allocation-context token.

items.title: verify:story-ready rejects a dirty tree or a non-running vBR

narrative.Acceptance: verify:story-ready rejects a dirty tree or a non-running vBRIEF and emits config-error exit 2 for a malformed allocation-context section.

items.title: The parity harness emits identical findings and exit codes t

narrative.Acceptance: The parity harness emits identical findings and exit codes to the Python oracle across clean, dirty, solo, and swarm-cohort fixtures with cache off.

references.title: Issue #1720: feat(ts-migration): port verify:story-ready (story-start Gate 0) to TS (Wave 2)

expected_outputs: story-ready-parity exits 0 with identical findings/exit codes versus the Python oracle (cache off)
vitest coverage >=85% across packages/core/src/story-ready and packages/cli/src/verify-story-ready.ts
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Traced to the Python oracle scripts/preflight_story_start.py via cache-off golden-diff parity fixtures, not a spec section.
